name: LiveRamp Data Connectivity Platform API
what_it_does: Data connectivity platform with REST API — enabling first-party data activation through identity resolution (RampID), secure data collaboration via clean rooms, data marketplace for audience enrichment, and privacy-safe distribution of first-party data to advertising platforms, data providers, and enterprise analytics systems.
use_cases: Connecting first-party customer data to advertising platforms via LiveRamp identity resolution
Setting up data clean room collaborations for privacy-safe audience measurement
Activating first-party audiences across 500+ advertising destinations via RampID
Enriching customer data with third-party attributes via LiveRamp Data Marketplace
Implementing post-cookie identity strategy using RampID for cookieless targeting
not_for: Simple email marketing (use Mailchimp or Klaviyo for email campaigns)
Small businesses (<50K customers) — LiveRamp ROI requires meaningful first-party data scale
Real-time bidding (LiveRamp provides identity, not bidding infrastructure)
best_when: An enterprise brand with large first-party customer data needs to activate that data across advertising platforms, enable privacy-safe data collaboration with partners, and build cookieless identity infrastructure.
avoid_when: You have a small customer database, don't advertise at significant scale, or primarily need simple email marketing rather than cross-channel data activation.

auth.notes: OAuth2 client credentials flow. Bearer token auth. Account-scoped with organization-level access. Webhook for data job completion events. File upload via SFTP for large data onboarding. API for data distribution to 500+ destinations. Clean room access via separate Habu (acquired 2023) or LiveRamp clean room interface. Scoped by destination and data type.

pricing.notes: San Francisco company. Founded 2011 as Acxiom data connectivity spin-off. NYSE listed (RAMP). $600M+ ARR (2023). Key data infrastructure for enterprise advertising. RampID is cookieless identity standard alternative to UID2. 500+ data destinations including Google, Meta, The Trade Desk, Amazon Ads. Acquired Habu (data clean room) 2023. SafeHaven clean room for privacy-safe collaboration. Largest data onboarding platform globally.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for data file management, distribution, and audience creation. OAuth2 auth. Good developer documentation. Large data onboarding via SFTP (files too large for REST API). Webhook for file processing completion. Data distribution to 500+ destinations configured in LiveRamp UI. Clean room access via separate Habu platform (post-2023 acquisition).
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: File read operations fully idempotent. Distribution job reads idempotent. Audience reads idempotent. File uploads use unique file ID for idempotency.
known_agent_gotchas: Large data files must be uploaded via SFTP — REST API only handles metadata and job management
Data processing is batch-based (not real-time) — expect 24-48 hour processing for large files
Identity resolution requires customer PII (email, phone, address) — strict data security required
Clean room functionality now via Habu platform (acquired 2023) — separate API and interface
GDPR consent required for EU data onboarding — LiveRamp stores consent records

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, CCPA, HIPAA compliant. US, EU, AU data residency. OAuth2 with scopes. NYSE-listed with public company security standards. Identity resolution processes highly sensitive PII (email, phone, SSN for some segments) — implement zero-trust data access. SFTP for file transfer must use key-based authentication. Data clean rooms use privacy-preserving computation — review clean room model before sharing data.
